title: Lots of additions
description: This is a small(for now) mod that adds lots of additions.
body:
A Minecraft mod for Forge 1.20.1 with lots of additions to play with.
This mod contains the following:

-A bleeper, model creeper and texture blaze,

-A can entity that u can ride but its agressive,

-a new nether biome,

-new wood type: mulk (only accesible with cheats),

-Subscribe button. press it when watching ANY youtuber.
